text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Northern Sarawak and Lahad Datu until 1:00PM; Wednesday, 22 April 2026.
text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Sarawak Utara dan Lahad Datu sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Rabu, 22 April 2026.

text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of southeastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, western part of Bunguran and Sulawesi until 1:00PM; Wednesday, 22 April 2026.
text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan tenggara Phuket, Selat Melaka, barat Bunguran dan Sulawesi sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Rabu, 22 April 2026.

text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
